name: Dungeon Online
short_description: A Dungeon Crawler that you can play alone or with your friends in online co-op. There's also Arena Mode where you can fight against other players in online pvp.
detailed_description:
Explore the Dungeon alone or with your friends in DUNGEON ONLINE.

Create your character and dive into the Dungeon, fight various enemies like skeletons and goblins, fight dangerous Bosses, and take your rewards to become even stronger.

Defeating enemies you obtain items and experience points to equip your character to increase your stats and conquer the Dungeon.

Enemies can drop items like their weapons, healing herbs, materials and summoning item.

You can even dissamble your weapons to obtain materials to upgrade your favourite weapons.

You can invite your friends to your lobby by in-game menu (they must be playing "Dungeon Online").

In a multiplayer session, only the Host can summon units or interact with objects like doors, checkpoints or lootable chest.

There is Arena Mode also, to fight other players in 3 types of PvP: Duel, Trio or Brawl.
